prompt: What are the part tables of `Probe`? Show me the one-liner you'd run to enumerate them, then list the names.

behavioral_checks: Calls Probe.parts() in the response to enumerate part tables.
Lists both part tables in Master.Part notation; does not invent additional Probe.* parts that don't exist

expected_output: Routes to common_tables.md (Probe entry) + datajoint_api.md (schema introspection). Run `Probe.parts()` — DataJoint returns the part-table classes attached to `Probe`. The two parts in Master.Part notation: `Probe.Shank`, `Probe.Electrode`. Does not invent additional Probe.* parts.
